image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Official Movie Poster
image:image.image:caption: Official poster for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest Occult Murder in the Inland Empire.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Alternate Festival Run Poster
image:image.image:caption: Alternate Festival Run Poster featuring the masked killer from the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Los asesinatos de Mr. Shiny Spanish Poster
image:image.image:caption: Official Spanish poster artwork for Strange Harvest titled Los asesinatos de Mr. Shiny.

image:image.image:title: Crime Scene Pool Investigation
image:image.image:caption: Forensic investigators examining a drained swimming pool crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Kitchen Crime Scene Symbol
image:image.image:caption: Occult symbol painted in blood on a kitchen wall at a crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Knife Evidence
image:image.image:caption: Blood stained knife labeled as forensic evidence during a murder investigation in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Bloody Handprint Evidence
image:image.image:caption: Bloody handprint marked as forensic evidence at a crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Detective Joe Kirby Interview
image:image.image:caption: Detective Joe Kirby giving an interview about the investigation in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Detective Lexi Taylor Interview
image:image.image:caption: Detective Lexi Taylor speaking during an investigative interview in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Press Poster
image:image.image:caption: Official poster for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest Occult Murder in the Inland Empire.

image:image.image:title: Detective Joe Kirby Press Still
image:image.image:caption: Detective Joe Kirby giving an interview about the investigation in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Detective Lexi Taylor Press Still
image:image.image:caption: Detective Lexi Taylor speaking during an investigative interview in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Pool Crime Scene Press Still
image:image.image:caption: Forensic investigators examining a drained swimming pool crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Kitchen Symbol Press Still
image:image.image:caption: Occult symbol painted in blood on a kitchen wall at a crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Mockumentary News Reporter Scene BTS
image:image.image:caption: Behind the scenes photo of a news reporter filming an interview scene for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Behind The Scenes Interview Setup
image:image.image:caption: Behind the scenes monitor view of an interview setup for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest with associate producer James Pearce standing in during lighting and camera setup.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Behind The Scenes Newsroom Scene
image:image.image:caption: Behind the scenes photo of Matthew M Garcia preparing for a newsroom interview scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Stuart Ortiz Editing Strange Harvest Horror Mockumentary
image:image.image:caption: Director Stuart Ortiz editing scenes for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest BTS Newsroom Set Jordon Moser Sound
image:image.image:caption: Behind the scenes of the newsroom set for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest, with associate producer and sound recordist Jordon Moser preparing the scene.

image:image.image:title: Stuart Ortiz Location Scout Strange Harvest Elderly Care Home
image:image.image:caption: Director Stuart Ortiz scouting the exterior elderly care home location for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest BTS Swat Team Mr Shiny Home Scene
image:image.image:caption: SWAT team actors and law enforcement advisor on set inside Mr. Shiny’s home during filming of the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Peter Zizzo Detective Joe Kirby Interview Strange Harvest BTS
image:image.image:caption: Peter Zizzo as Detective Joe Kirby filming an interview scene during production of the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest BTS Hospital Scene Kale Hicks Stand In
image:image.image:caption: Kale Hicks standing in for actor Victoria Macenroe during a hospital scene setup for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Sheriff Investigating Barbed Wire Pool
image:image.image:caption: Sheriff investigating a barbed wire filled pool crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Ritual Symbol Crime Scene
image:image.image:caption: Ritual symbol made of sticks at a crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Glen Sandweiss Victim Interview Strange Harvest
image:image.image:caption: Glen Sandweiss appearing as a victim during an interview in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Mr Shiny Handwritten Note Strange Harvest
image:image.image:caption: Handwritten note from Mr Shiny discovered during the investigation in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Mr Shiny Found Footage Bedroom Strange Harvest
image:image.image:caption: Mr Shiny appearing in a bedroom in found footage from the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Blood Buckets Evidence
image:image.image:caption: Buckets filled with blood discovered as evidence in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Kitchen Crime Scene Victim
image:image.image:caption: Victim discovered in a restaurant kitchen crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Security Footage Donut Shop Massacre
image:image.image:caption: Security camera footage of a violent crime scene inside a donut shop in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest News Interview Saroj Mallick Witness
image:image.image:caption: Saroj Mallick giving a witness interview during a breaking news report about Mr Shiny in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Mr Shiny Vhs Evidence Tape Strange Harvest
image:image.image:caption: Evidence VHS tape with a handwritten message from Mr Shiny discovered during the investigation in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Astronomical Photo Investigation Clue
image:image.image:caption: Investigator examining a mysterious astronomical photograph connected to the case in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Hail Azragor Blood Message Strange Harvest
image:image.image:caption: Blood message reading HAIL AZRAGOR discovered during the investigation in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Cult Journal Leech Lives
image:image.image:caption: Disturbing handwritten cult journal discovered during the investigation in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Crime Scene Paint Tray Evidence
image:image.image:caption: Blood covered paint tray and roller marked as evidence at a crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Jamie Kim News Report
image:image.image:caption: Reporter Jamie Kim delivering a live news report during the investigation in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Bloody Oxygen Tank Crime Scene Evidence
image:image.image:caption: Blood covered oxygen tank marked as crime scene evidence in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Triple Murder News Report
image:image.image:caption: Breaking news coverage of a triple murder investigation in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Crime Scene Paint Bucket Evidence
image:image.image:caption: Crime scene evidence including a blood filled bucket and paint roller used in the murders in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Occult Ritual Jar Candles
image:image.image:caption: Occult ritual site with candles and a jar containing leeches discovered during the investigation in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest River Body Recovery
image:image.image:caption: Forensic investigators recovering a body from a river crime scene in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Forest Cult Structures
image:image.image:caption: Strange wooden ritual structures discovered in a remote forest during the investigation in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Dining Room Murder Scene
image:image.image:caption: Crime scene investigators examine victims seated at a dining table in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Nursery Surveillance Footage
image:image.image:caption: Disturbing surveillance footage showing an intruder leaning over a baby crib in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Abduction Investigation Flashlight
image:image.image:caption: Investigators searching a dark room with flashlights during an abduction investigation in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Evidence Mask Forensic Photo
image:image.image:caption: Disturbing mask recovered as forensic evidence in the investigation featured in Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Power Drill Crime Scene Evidence
image:image.image:caption: Power drill photographed as forensic evidence during the investigation in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Cult Ritual Night Forest
image:image.image:caption: Occult ritual structure illuminated by firelight deep in the forest in the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Official Movie Poster
image:image.image:caption: Official poster for the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest Occult Murder in the Inland Empire.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Alternate Movie Poster
image:image.image:caption: Alternate poster featuring the masked killer from the horror mockumentary Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:caption: Official Spanish poster artwork for Strange Harvest titled Los asesinatos de Mr. Shiny.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Beyond Fest Theater Screening
image:image.image:caption: Audience watching Strange Harvest during the Beyond Fest screening.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Cast Crew Screening Theater
image:image.image:caption: Empty theater before the cast and crew screening of the horror film Strange Harvest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Fantastic Fest Q&A Panel
image:image.image:caption: Filmmakers on stage during the Strange Harvest Q&A panel at Fantastic Fest.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Beyond Fest Screening Introduction
image:image.image:caption: Hosts introducing Strange Harvest at the Beyond Fest screening.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Fantastic Fest Panel Discussion
image:image.image:caption: Cast and filmmakers discussing Strange Harvest during a Fantastic Fest panel.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Fantastic Fest Afterparty
image:image.image:caption: Filmmakers celebrating Strange Harvest at the Fantastic Fest afterparty.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Beyond Fest Panel Stage
image:image.image:caption: Strange Harvest filmmakers speaking on stage during the Beyond Fest Q&A.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Fantastic Fest Poster Photo
image:image.image:caption: Filmmaker posing with the Fantastic Fest 2024 poster during Strange Harvest festival run.

image:image.image:title: Strange Harvest Fantastic Fest Poster Photo Group
image:image.image:caption: Filmmakers posing in front of the Fantastic Fest 2024 poster during Strange Harvest premiere.
